time_unit.evidence_statement: Legacy APB1da dt, ttime and exported .dat Time are in minutes.

case_equivalence.reason: Essential temporal, injection, geometry, fluid, formation and PKN-identification parameters were extracted from the hard-coded legacy main. The controlled modern case is created for future run-level checks, but no run or physical equivalence is asserted in this phase.

better_pair_search.reason: A new controlled validation YAML was created instead of modifying the existing migrated BUZ67D case.

phase10_18a_volumetric_balance_diagnosti.diagnostic_observation: The opt-in volumetric_balance maximum pressure is closer to audited legacy pw_Pa than pkn_direct for the controlled BUZ67D run.
caveats: Diagnostic only; not physical validation.
Legacy pw_Pa and modern wellbore_pressure_Pa remain semantically distinct.
Legacy audit includes a no-injection tail to 1320 s, while the controlled modern run covers 0..750 s.
No shut-in, accommodation, Zamora, sigmaTheta, margin or opened comparison was performed.

phase10_18b_initial_pressure_shutin_diag.diagnostic_observation: initial_pressure_Pa is confirmed in the legacy pw contract and the modern cycle now covers 0..1320 s, but the current simplified balance overshoots legacy maximum pressure.
caveats: Diagnostic only; not physical validation.
initial_pressure_Pa is extracted from audited legacy pw_Pa at t=0 where dP=0.
Shut-in is represented as Q=0 and constant injected volume.
No Zamora, casing elasticity, APB/salt feedback, sigmaTheta, margin or opened comparison was performed.

phase10_18c_fracture_volume_balance_diag.diagnostic_observation: The modern volumetric_balance route can subtract fracture and leakoff increments after a simplified fracture.pressure threshold, but it does not reproduce the legacy sigma-theta influence-height criterion. In the controlled BUZ67D case, the placeholder 1 Pa threshold opens too early and does not improve numeric equivalence.
caveats: Diagnostic only; not physical validation.
Legacy fracture starts from |pi + dP| > |sigma tangential at influence height|.
Modern PknModel does not compute the legacy influence-height sigma tangential criterion.
fracture.breakdown.pressure is only a simplified opt-in approximation.
No Zamora, casing elasticity, APB/salt feedback, sigmaTheta, margin or opened comparison was performed.

phase10_18e_static_legacy_breakdown_diag.diagnostic_observation: A traceable static threshold was extracted from the legacy marker, but the modern volumetric_balance route still opens too early and remains close to the 10.18C pressure response.
caveats: Diagnostic only; not physical validation.
Legacy absolute pw_Pa is recorded separately from the delta pressure consumed by the current PknModel threshold.
Static fracture.breakdown.pressure does not reproduce the legacy sigma-theta influence-height criterion.
No sigmaTheta, margin, opened, damage, salt or rupture comparison was performed.

phase10_18f_fracture_trace_audit.diagnostic_observation: The legacy instrumented trace delays the first positive fracture/leakoff sink until the step after sigma-theta opening, but the modern static threshold opens at 30 s. The dominant divergence is therefore the opening criterion, not a confirmed local sink-order bug.
caveats: Diagnostic only; not physical validation.
Legacy trace rows include nonlinear iteration samples.
Modern trace is reconstructed from ResultWriter CSV, not a runtime debug hook.
No C++ solver correction was authorized by the trace evidence.
No sigma-theta runtime criterion was implemented in this phase.

phase10_19a_sigma_theta_static_provider.diagnostic_observation: The sigma_theta_static provider reaches PknModel through YAML/CaseData/PknRunner, but the static proxy still opens at 30 s and is not a physical replacement for runtime SaltWallStressDiagnostics.
caveats: Diagnostic only; not physical validation.
sigma_theta_static is a YAML-supplied static proxy.
No saltcreep runtime stress was connected.
No Zamora, casing compliance, compositional fluid or temporal salt coupling was implemented.

phase10_19b_flowrate_balance_audit.diagnostic_observation: Legacy idQ=6 converts 0.5 bbl/min to m3/min/rad and the modern total/total convention is algebraically equivalent. The first-step pure-fluid compression estimate matches the modern trial jump scale, while the audited legacy first dP is far smaller because APB1da includes geometric dV/compliance in the active dP formula.
caveats: Diagnostic only; not physical validation.
No C++ solver correction was applied.
No Zamora, sigma-theta runtime provider, casing compliance model or new PKN formulation was implemented.
results/comparison/phase10_19b outputs are local diagnostics and must not be versioned.

phase10_19c_geometric_compliance.diagnostic_observation: A constant opt-in geometric compliance inferred from the first legacy step fixes the first-step pressure scale and brings the maximum modern pressure within 10%, but it is not a validated casing/formation mechanics model and does not match the legacy opening time.
caveats: Diagnostic only; not physical validation.
Compliance is constant and inferred from first-step legacy dP.
No Zamora, sigma-theta runtime, casing mechanics model or APB/salt coupling was implemented.
results/comparison/phase10_19c outputs are local diagnostics and must not be versioned.

phase10_20a_mechanical_compliance_formul.diagnostic_observation: The legacy dV term is computed from annular boundary displacements and enters the APB pressure balance before fracture/leakoff comparison. A simple elastic radial compliance can be formulated and tested, but it is expected to be much smaller than the constant diagnostic compliance inferred from one legacy step.
caveats: Formulation only; no runtime solver correction in Phase 10.20A.
elastic_annular_simple is a reduced diagnostic model, not a full APB/salt mechanical solve.
The simple estimate does not include viscoelastic salt time stepping, multi-layer stiffness coupling or Zamora fluid updates.
Level 1 physical validation remains closed.

phase10_20b_elastic_annular_compliance_m.formula: C_geom = 2 * (b*c_outer + a*c_inner) / (b^2 - a^2); C_eff = C_fluid + C_geom
phase10_20b_elastic_annular_compliance_m.expected_buz67d_behavior: The simple elastic model is expected to improve pressure scale less than constant_geometric and may classify as undercompliant in Phase 10.20C.
caveats: Opt-in only; no default runtime change.
Not a full APB/salt coupled mechanics model.
No Zamora, sigma-theta runtime or temporal salt coupling was implemented.

phase10_21a_apparent_compliance_extracti.formula: C_eff_apparent = delta_Vq_m3_rad / (Vi_m3_rad * delta_dP_Pa); C_geom_apparent = C_eff_apparent - k
